summary:
Fixed the overlapping-segment bug.

Change made:
src/config.rs
• Re-implemented segments_for_worker so that it now splits the total number of segments into disjoint, contiguous blocks distributed among workers, eliminating the previous intentional 2-segment overlap that caused concurrent threads to write to the same offsets.

All tests now pass:
$ ./test.sh
PASS: All concurrent write runs produced correct output
